security.csp: default-src 'self' tauri:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-inline' tauri:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.cesium.com https://*.ion.cesium.com https://*.openstreetmap.org https://tile.openstreetmap.org https://*.arcgisonline.com https://server.arcgisonline.com; connect-src 'self' tauri: ipc: https://*.cesium.com https://*.ion.cesium.com https://*.openstreetmap.org https://tile.openstreetmap.org https://*.arcgisonline.com https://server.arcgisonline.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; child-src 'self' blob:; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Tsunami simulator for asteroid impacts, nuclear detonations, earthquakes, and landslides
bundle.longDescription: A scientifically grounded 3D-globe desktop application for simulating tsunami generation, propagation, and coastal inundation. Uses Ward & Asphaug analytical formulas for asteroid impacts, Glasstone-Dolan + Le Méhauté for nuclear sources, Fritz-Hager for landslides, and Synolakis for coastal runup. Historical presets include Chicxulub, Tōhoku 2011, Indian Ocean 2004, and Lituya Bay 1958.
